Package neqsim.process.safety.scenario

Class ReleaseDispersionScenarioGenerator

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.safety.scenario.ReleaseDispersionScenarioGenerator
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class ReleaseDispersionScenarioGenerator extends Object implements Serializable
Generates leak source terms and gas dispersion screening scenarios from a process flowsheet.

The generator walks ProcessSystem unit operations, discovers standalone streams and equipment outlet streams, builds a LeakModel for each pressurized stream candidate, and sends the resulting SourceTermResult to GasDispersionAnalyzer. Optional scenario taxonomy, weather envelopes, trapped-inventory results and consequence branches make the output suitable for structured QRA and CFD source-term handoffs.

Version:
1.0
Author:
ESOL
See Also:

  • Constructor Details

    • ReleaseDispersionScenarioGenerator

      public ReleaseDispersionScenarioGenerator(ProcessSystem processSystem)
      Creates a release-dispersion scenario generator.
      Parameters:
      processSystem - process system to scan for stream release candidates

    • boundaryConditions

      public ReleaseDispersionScenarioGenerator boundaryConditions(BoundaryConditions boundaryConditions)
      Sets the boundary conditions for generated dispersion calculations.
      Parameters:
      boundaryConditions - weather and ambient conditions
      Returns:
      this generator

      public ReleaseDispersionScenarioGenerator holeDiameter(double holeDiameterM)
      Sets the representative leak hole diameter.
      Parameters:
      holeDiameterM - hole diameter in m, must be positive
      Returns:
      this generator

    • holeDiameter

      public ReleaseDispersionScenarioGenerator holeDiameter(double holeDiameter, String unit)
      Sets the representative leak hole diameter with unit conversion.
      Parameters:
      holeDiameter - hole diameter value, must be positive
      unit - diameter unit, one of m, mm, or in
      Returns:
      this generator

      public ReleaseDispersionScenarioGenerator fullBoreDiameter(double diameter, String unit)
      Sets the full-bore rupture diameter used by the taxonomy.
      Parameters:
      diameter - full-bore diameter value, must be positive
      unit - diameter unit, one of m, mm, or in
      Returns:
      this generator

    • inventoryVolume

      public ReleaseDispersionScenarioGenerator inventoryVolume(double inventoryVolumeM3)
      Sets the representative isolated inventory volume used by the source-term model.
      Parameters:
      inventoryVolumeM3 - inventory volume in m3, must be positive
      Returns:
      this generator

    • trappedInventory

      inventoryResult - trapped inventory result from TrappedInventoryCalculator
      Returns:
      this generator

      Calculates and uses an evidence-linked trapped inventory result.
      Parameters:
      inventoryCalculator - configured trapped inventory calculator
      Returns:
      this generator

    • releaseDuration

      public ReleaseDispersionScenarioGenerator releaseDuration(double releaseDurationSeconds, double timeStepSeconds)
      Sets release duration and time step for generated source terms.
      Parameters:
      releaseDurationSeconds - release duration in seconds, must be positive
      timeStepSeconds - time step in seconds, must be positive
      Returns:
      this generator

    • releaseHeight

      public ReleaseDispersionScenarioGenerator releaseHeight(double releaseHeightM)
      Sets the effective release height used in dispersion screening.
      Parameters:
      releaseHeightM - release height in m, must be non-negative
      Returns:
      this generator

    • minimumPressure

      public ReleaseDispersionScenarioGenerator minimumPressure(double minimumPressureBara)
      Sets the minimum stream pressure required before a stream is screened.
      Parameters:
      minimumPressureBara - minimum absolute pressure in bara
      Returns:
      this generator

    • minimumMassFlowRate

      public ReleaseDispersionScenarioGenerator minimumMassFlowRate(double minimumMassFlowRateKgPerS)
      Sets the minimum stream mass flow required before a stream is screened.
      Parameters:
      minimumMassFlowRateKgPerS - minimum stream mass flow rate in kg/s, must be non-negative
      Returns:
      this generator

    • backPressure

      public ReleaseDispersionScenarioGenerator backPressure(double backPressureBara)
      Sets the downstream back pressure for the leak model.
      Parameters:
      backPressureBara - back pressure in bara, normally atmospheric pressure
      Returns:
      this generator

    • releaseOrientation

      public ReleaseDispersionScenarioGenerator releaseOrientation(ReleaseOrientation releaseOrientation)
      Sets release orientation for generated source terms.
      Parameters:
      releaseOrientation - release direction, defaults to horizontal when null
      Returns:
      this generator

    • modelSelection

      public ReleaseDispersionScenarioGenerator modelSelection(GasDispersionAnalyzer.ModelSelection modelSelection)
      Sets the dispersion model selection strategy.
      Parameters:
      modelSelection - dispersion model selection strategy, defaults to auto when null
      Returns:
      this generator

    • toxicEndpoint

      public ReleaseDispersionScenarioGenerator toxicEndpoint(String componentName, double thresholdPpm)
      Adds a toxic endpoint calculation to every generated dispersion scenario.
      Parameters:
      componentName - component name in the NeqSim fluid
      thresholdPpm - toxic threshold in ppm, must be positive
      Returns:
      this generator

      public ReleaseDispersionScenarioGenerator useDefaultScenarioTaxonomy()

      this generator

    • sectorWeather

      private static ReleaseDispersionScenarioGenerator.WeatherCase sectorWeather(String name, double windDirectionDeg)
      Creates a neutral-sector weather case.
      Parameters:
      name - weather case name
      windDirectionDeg - wind direction in degrees
      Returns:
      weather case

    • discoverStreamCandidates

      private List<ReleaseDispersionScenarioGenerator.StreamCandidate> discoverStreamCandidates()
      Discovers stream release candidates from standalone streams and equipment outlet streams.
      Returns:
      stream candidates passing basic pressure and flow screening

    • addCandidate

      private void addCandidate(List<ReleaseDispersionScenarioGenerator.StreamCandidate> candidates, Set<String> seenStreamKeys, ProcessEquipmentInterface equipment, StreamInterface stream)
      Adds a stream candidate if it is valid and has not already been added.
      Parameters:
      candidates - target candidate list
      seenStreamKeys - identity keys already added
      equipment - owning or producing equipment
      stream - stream to evaluate

    • isEligibleStream

      private boolean isEligibleStream(StreamInterface stream)
      Checks whether a stream should be screened for release dispersion.
      Parameters:
      stream - stream to check
      Returns:
      true if the stream has a fluid, positive flow and sufficient pressure

    • generateScenario

      private ReleaseDispersionScenarioGenerator.ReleaseDispersionScenario generateScenario(ReleaseDispersionScenarioGenerator.StreamCandidate candidate, ReleaseDispersionScenarioGenerator.ReleaseCase releaseCase, ReleaseDispersionScenarioGenerator.WeatherCase weatherCase)
      Generates one release-dispersion scenario from a stream candidate.
      Parameters:
      candidate - stream candidate to screen
      releaseCase - release taxonomy case
      weatherCase - weather case
      Returns:
      generated scenario, or null if source-term generation gives no release

      Gets the active release case list.

      Creates a readable scenario name.
      Parameters:
      candidate - stream candidate
      releaseCase - release case
      weatherCase - weather case
      Returns:
      scenario name

      private static String safeName(String name, String fallback)
      Returns a fallback name when a process object name is empty.
      Parameters:
      name - original name
      fallback - fallback name
      Returns:
      non-empty name

      private static double toMeters(double value, String unit)
      Converts a diameter value to meters.

      value - diameter value
      unit - diameter unit
      Returns:
      diameter in m

      private static double effectiveVolume(TrappedInventoryCalculator.InventoryResult inventoryResult)
      Gets an effective source volume from a trapped inventory result.
      Parameters:
      inventoryResult - trapped inventory result
      Returns:
      gas volume, or total volume when gas volume is zero

      private static String streamIdentityKey(StreamInterface stream)
      Creates a stable stream identity key for duplicate suppression.
      Parameters:
      stream - stream to identify
      Returns:
      identity key

      Returns:
